rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SU HWA WAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petitioners' Second Amended Petition
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Stephen M. Murphy. Hearing required. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
